metadata.description: Preferred AVD delivery mode. Leave empty to preserve the legacy desktop-only behavior driven by hostPoolType.
Local admin username for session hosts
Local admin password for session hosts
Storage account name for FSLogix profiles (must be globally unique, 3-24 chars, lowercase/numbers only)
Entra Object ID of the user to grant AVD access. Leave empty to skip role assignments.

RemoteApp definitions used when avdMode publishes RemoteApps. Each item must include name and filePath and can optionally include friendlyName, description, commandLineSetting, and commandLineArguments.
Per-deployment seed used to keep session host computer names unique across redeployments in the same resource group.
Load balancer type for pooled host pool
RemoteApp definitions. Each item must include name and filePath and can optionally include friendlyName, description, commandLineSetting, and commandLineArguments.
Number of session hosts to deploy
Subnet resource ID for session hosts
Host pool name to register VMs with
Per-deployment seed used to avoid reusing the same computer name across redeployments in the same resource group

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]), 'InstallAVDAgent')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]])), 'avd-contributor'))]
